Sharon Vonne Stone (née le 10 mars 1958) est une actrice, productrice et ancienne mannequin américaine. Elle est récipiendaire d'un Primetime Emmy Award et d'un Golden Globe Award, ainsi que de nominations pour un Academy Award et deux Screen Actors Guild Awards.

Après avoir été mannequin dans des publicités télévisées et imprimées, elle a fait ses débuts au cinéma en tant que figurante dans la comédie dramatique Stardust Memories de Woody Allen (1980). Son premier rôle parlant était dans le film d'horreur de Wes Craven Deadly Blessing (1981), et tout au long des années 1980, Stone a continué à apparaître dans des films tels que Différences irréconciliables (1984), Les Mines du roi Salomon (1985), Cold Steel (1987), Action Jackson (1988) et Au-dessus de la loi (1988). Elle a acquis une notoriété grand public avec son rôle dans le film d'action de science-fiction Total Recall (1990) de Paul Verhoeven.

Stone est devenue un sex-symbol et a acquis une reconnaissance internationale lorsqu'elle a joué le rôle de Catherine Tramell dans un autre film de Verhoeven, le thriller érotique Basic Instinct (1992), pour lequel elle a remporté sa première nomination au Golden Globe Award de la meilleure actrice dans un film dramatique. Elle a été acclamée par la critique avec son interprétation dans le drame policier épique de Martin Scorsese, Casino (1995), remportant le Golden Globe Award et une nomination à l'Oscar de la meilleure actrice.

Stone a reçu deux autres nominations aux Golden Globe Awards pour ses rôles dans The Mighty (1998) et The Muse (1999). Ses autres rôles notables au cinéma incluent Sliver (1993), The Specialist (1994), The Quick and the Dead (1995), Last Dance (1996), Sphere (1998), Catwoman (2004), Broken Flowers (2005), Alpha Dog. (2006), Basic Instinct 2 (2006), Bobby (2006), Lovelace (2013), Fading Gigolo (2013) et The Disaster Artist (2017). En 1995, elle reçoit une étoile sur le Hollywood Walk of Fame et en 2005, elle est nommée Officier de l'Ordre des Arts et des Lettres en France.

À la télévision, Stone a eu des performances remarquables dans la mini-série War and Remembrance (1987) et dans le téléfilm HBO If These Walls Could Talk 2 (2000). Elle a fait des apparitions dans The Practice (2004), remportant le Primetime Emmy Award de la meilleure actrice invitée dans une série dramatique, et dans Law & Order: Special Victims Unit (2010). Stone est également apparu dans les séries Agent X (2015), Mosaic (2017) et The New Pope (2019).

data.biography:
Sharon Vonne Stone è un'attrice, produttrice ed ex modella americana. Ha ricevuto un Primetime Emmy Award e un Golden Globe Award, oltre ad aver ricevuto nomination per un Academy Award e due Screen Actors Guild Awards.

Dopo aver posato in spot televisivi e pubblicità stampate, ha fatto il suo debutto cinematografico come comparsa nella commedia drammatica di Woody Allen Stardust Memories (1980). La sua prima parte orale è stata nel film horror di Wes Craven Deadly Blessing (1981), e nel corso degli anni '80, Stone ha continuato ad apparire in film come Differenze inconciliabili (1984), Le miniere di Re Salomone (1985), Cold Steel (1987), Action Jackson (1988) e Above the Law (1988). Ha trovato la ribalta del mainstream con la sua parte nel film d'azione di fantascienza di Paul Verhoeven Total Recall (1990).

La Stone è diventata un sex symbol ed è salita al riconoscimento internazionale quando ha interpretato il ruolo di Catherine Tramell in un altro film di Verhoeven, il thriller erotico Basic Instinct (1992), per il quale ha ottenuto la sua prima nomination ai Golden Globe come migliore attrice in un film drammatico. Ha ricevuto ulteriori consensi dalla critica con la sua interpretazione nel dramma poliziesco epico di Martin Scorsese Casino (1995), ottenendo il Golden Globe e una nomination all'Oscar come migliore attrice.

La Stone ha ricevuto altre due nomination ai Golden Globe per i suoi ruoli in The Mighty (1998) e The Muse (1999). I suoi altri ruoli cinematografici degni di nota includono Sliver (1993), The Specialist (1994), The Quick and the Dead (1995), Last Dance (1996), Sphere (1998), Catwoman (2004), Broken Flowers (2005), Alpha Dog (2006), Basic Instinct 2 (2006), Bobby (2006), Lovelace (2013), Fading Gigolo (2013) e The Disaster Artist (2017). Nel 1995 ha ricevuto una stella sulla Hollywood Walk of Fame e nel 2005 è stata nominata Ufficiale dell'Ordine delle Arti e delle Lettere in Francia.

In televisione, Stone ha avuto notevoli interpretazioni nella miniserie War and Remembrance (1987) e nel film per la televisione della HBO If These Walls Could Talk 2 (2000). Ha fatto apparizioni come ospite in The Practice (2004), vincendo il Primetime Emmy Award come migliore attrice ospite in una serie drammatica, e in Law & Order: Special Victims Unit (2010). Stone è apparso anche nelle serie Agent X (2015), Mosaic (2017) e The New Pope (2019).

Sharon Vonne Stone, 10 Mart 1958 tarihinde Meadville, Pensilvanya'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Bir fabrika işçisi baba ve bir muhasebeci annenin dört çocuğundan ikincisi olarak mütevazı bir ailede büyüdü. Akademik olarak oldukça parlak bir çocuk olan Stone, 154 IQ'su ile dikkat çekti ve henüz 15 yaşındayken Edinboro Üniversitesi'ne burslu olarak kabul edildi. Yaratıcı yazarlık ve güzel sanatlar eğitimi alırken, yerel güzellik yarışmalarına katılarak modellik dünyasına ilk adımını attı. Kısa süre sonra üniversite eğitimini yarıda bırakarak New York'a taşındı ve prestijli Ford Modellik Ajansı ile anlaştı. 1970'lerin sonunda ve 80'lerin başında başarılı bir model olarak tanındı, ancak asıl tutkusu oyunculuktu.

Sinema kariyerine Woody Allen'ın "Stardust Memories" (1980) filmindeki diyalogsuz, kısa bir rolle başladı. 1980'ler boyunca "Irreconcilable Differences" (1984) ve "Police Academy 4: Citizens on Patrol" (1987) gibi filmlerde ve çeşitli televizyon dizilerinde küçük roller alarak deneyim kazandı. Kariyerindeki ilk önemli çıkışı, Paul Verhoeven'in yönettiği ve Arnold Schwarzenegger ile başrolü paylaştığı 1990 yapımı bilimkurgu-aksiyon filmi "Gerçeğe Çağrı" (Total Recall) ile yakaladı. Bu filmdeki performansıyla Hollywood'un dikkatini çekti.

Ancak Sharon Stone'u uluslararası bir süperstar ve bir popüler kültür ikonuna dönüştüren rol, yine Paul Verhoeven'in yönettiği 1992 yapımı erotik gerilim "Temel İçgüdü" (Basic Instinct) oldu. Filmde canlandırdığı zeki, manipülatif ve baştan çıkarıcı cinayet zanlısı yazar Catherine Tramell karakteri, sinema tarihinin en unutulmaz "femme fatale" (felaket kadını) figürlerinden biri haline geldi. Filmdeki cesur performansı ve özellikle meşhur sorgu sahnesi, onu bir gecede dünyanın en çok konuşulan kadın oyuncusu yaptı ve bu rolüyle ilk Altın Küre adaylığını kazandı.

"Temel İçgüdü"nün ardından gelen şöhreti, "Sliver" (1993) ve "Uzman" (The Specialist) (1994) gibi filmlerle pekiştirdi. Ancak oyunculuk yeteneğini en üst düzeyde kanıtladığı yapım, Martin Scorsese'nin yönettiği 1995 yapımı epik suç draması "Casino" oldu. Bu filmde canlandırdığı hırslı ve trajik Ginger McKenna Rothstein rolüyle En İyi Kadın Oyuncu dalında Altın Küre Ödülü'nü kazandı ve Akademi Ödülü'ne (Oscar) aday gösterildi. Bu performans, onun sadece bir Hollywood yıldızı değil, aynı zamanda yetenekli bir drama oyuncusu olduğunu da tescilledi.

2001 yılında geçirdiği ve hayati tehlike yaratan beyin kanaması, kariyerine uzun bir ara vermesine neden oldu. Sağlığına yeniden kavuştuktan sonra sinemaya ve televizyona dönen Stone, "Kırık Çiçekler" (Broken Flowers) (2005) gibi bağımsız yapımlarda ve "The Practice" (2004) dizisindeki konuk rolüyle Emmy Ödülü kazanarak yeteneğini sergilemeye devam etti. Sonraki yıllarda "Bobby" (2006), "Lovelace" (2013) ve "The Disaster Artist" (2017) gibi filmlerin yanı sıra "Mosaic" (2018) ve "Ratched" (2020) gibi televizyon projelerinde de yer aldı. Oyunculuğun yanı sıra, uzun yıllardır HIV/AIDS araştırmaları için yürüttüğü aktivist çalışmalarıyla da tanınan Stone, bu alandaki katkılarından dolayı çok sayıda insani yardım ödülü almıştır.

William Gregory Magnussen (born April 20, 1985) is an American actor. He has been featured in the films Into the Woods (2014), Bridge of Spies (2015), Birth of the Dragon (2016), Game Night (2018), and Aladdin (2019), and has had supporting television roles in Get Shorty (2017) and Maniac (2018). In 2021, Magnussen starred in the sci-fi series Made for Love on HBO Max and appeared in the films The Many Saints of Newark and No Time to Die. In 2023, he starred as Rey "The King" Kingston in Spy Kids: Armageddon.

He has starred in Broadway and off-Broadway theatre productions, including 2013's Vanya and Sonia and Masha and Spike, for which he received a nomination for the Tony Award for Best Featured Actor in a Play.

William Gregory „Billy“ Magnussen (* 20. April 1985 in Woodhaven, Queens, New York City) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler.

2007 gab Magnussen mit einer Rolle im Theaterstück The Ritz sein Debüt am Broadway. Von 2008 bis 2010 stellte er in der Seifenoper Jung und Leidenschaftlich – Wie das Leben so spielt in 199 Episoden die Figur des Casey Hughes dar, die zuvor von Zach Roerig gespielt worden war. Parallel erhielt Magnussen erste Nebenrollen in Spielfilmen.

2014 war er im Fantasy-Musical Into the Woods als Prinz von Rapunzel zu sehen. In der Literaturverfilmung The Big Short trat er 2015 gemeinsam mit Max Greenfield als Hypothekenmakler auf. 2016 übernahm er in Fernsehserie American Crime Story, deren erste Staffel den Strafprozess gegen O. J. Simpson thematisierte, die Rolle des Kato Kaelin.

Quelle: Wikipedia

Billy Magnussen jest amerykańskim aktorem oper mydlanych, bardziej znany za rolę w CBS Soap Opera "As The World Turns", gdzie przyjął rolę Casey's Hughes'a 29 stycznia 2008r.

Od 10 lat żyje w Cumming w Georgii. Jest niedawnym absolwentem Szkoły w Płn. Karolinie.

W 2007 miał swój debiut na Broodway'u w "The Ritz", natomiast w 2008 pojawił się w filmie "Blood Night". Wystąpił w ostatnio nakręconym filmie "Happy Tears" obok Demi Moore i Parkera Posey'a.

W wolnym czasie lubi być aktywny i trzymać formę uprawiając m.in.: rafting, wspinaczkę skałkową oraz wiffle ball i dodge ball.

比利·马格努森，美国演员。代表作有《魔法黑森林》《龙之诞生》《游戏之夜》等。马格努森生于美国纽约，在佐治亚州长大，母亲是健美操教练，父亲是职业健美/搏击运动员。马格努森从北卡罗来纳州艺术大学毕业后，于2007年开始了自己的百老汇舞台表演生涯。2012年，他搭档大卫·海德·皮尔斯、西格妮·韦弗参演克里斯托弗·杜朗指导的话剧 Vanya and Sonia and Masha and Spike，本剧获得六项托尼奖提名，其中就包括马格努森的最佳男配角提名。电影方面，马格努森曾参演《嗜血之夜》《喜悦之泪》《十二》《失落的情人节》《待解救的少女》《魔法黑森林》《龙之诞生》《养女基里》《游戏之夜》和迪士尼真人版《阿拉丁》等。电视方面，马格努森曾参演《美国犯罪故事》（第一季）《美丽生活》等。

表演事业以外，马格努森还曾经在摇滚乐队The Dash里担任贝斯手，在另一支乐队Reserved for Rondee里担任吉他手。
data.name: 比利·马格努森

表演事業以外，馬格努森還曾經在搖滾樂隊 The Dash 裏擔任貝斯手，在另一支樂隊 Reserved for Rondee 裏擔任吉他手。

data.biography:
杨壹童，原名杨琼，1984年2月4日出生于福建省南平市松溪县，中国内地女演员，毕业于上海戏剧学院表演系本科。

外形甜美知性的杨壹童一出道就备受业内看好，凭借在经典热播剧《皇上二大爷》中女扮男装出演琉球公主“傻三”一角，成为当时最具潜力的荧屏新秀。而正值演艺事业上升期的杨壹童却毅然暂别荧屏，出国游学。

2012年，杨壹童正式复出，接连在电视剧《燃烧的花朵》《兵出潼关》中担纲女主角。而复出后的杨壹童，在获得更加丰富的生活感悟后，更添从容淡定，演技愈发炉火纯青。
data.name: 杨壹童

data.biography:
Frances Louise McDormand (born Cynthia Ann Smith; June 23, 1957) is an American film, stage and television actress. McDormand began her career on stage and made her screen debut in the 1984 film Blood Simple, having since appeared in several theatrical and television roles. McDormand has been recognized for her performances in 'Mississippi Burning' (1988), 'Short Cuts' (1993), 'Fargo' (1996), 'Wonder Boys' (2000), 'Almost Famous' (2000), 'North Country' (2005), 'Moonrise Kingdom' (2012), 'Hail, Caesar!' (2016), 'Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri' (2017), 'Nomadland' (2020) and 'The Tragedy of Macbeth' (2021).

Throughout her career, she has been nominated for eight Golden Globes, five Academy Awards, four BAFTA Awards, and three Emmy Awards. She is one of the few performers to achieve the "Triple Crown of Acting", winning an Academy Award, a Primetime Emmy Award, and a Tony Award. She won her first Academy Award for Best Actress in 1997 for her role as Marge Gunderson in 'Fargo'.  She also won Best Supporting Actress from the Broadcast Film Critics Association, the Florida Film Critics Circle, and the Los Angeles Film Critics Association for her performance in 'Wonder Boys' (2000).  McDormand returned to the stage in the David Lindsay-Abaire play Good People on Broadway from February 8, 2011 to April 24, 2011. In 2017, McDormand starred in 'Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri' which earned her a second Academy Award for Best Actress.

McDormand has been married to filmmaker Joel Coen since 1984, they reside in New York City along with their adopted son Pedro.
data.name: Frances McDormand

data.biography:
Frances McDormand es una actriz estadounidense. Ha estado casada con el director Joel Coen desde 1984 y ha protagonizado varias películas de los hermanos Coen, incluyendo Blood Simple (1984), Raising Arizona (1987), Fargo (1996), The Man Who Wasn't There (2001) y Burn After Reading (2008). McDormand se encuentra entre el grupo de actores que ha conseguido la Triple Corona de la Actuación. En 1997, ganó el Óscar a la mejor actriz por Fargo; en 2011, ganó el Premio Tony a la mejor actriz principal en una obra de teatro por la producción original de Broadway Good People; y en 2015, ganó el Primetime Emmy a la mejor actriz en una Miniserie o telefilme por Olive Kitteridge.

McDormand hizo su debut en Broadway en una nueva puesta en escena de Awake and Sing! en 1984, y recibió una nominación al Premio Tony por su papel de Stella Kowalski en la obra Un tranvía llamado Deseo de 1988. Volvió a Broadway por primera vez en veinte años para protagonizar The Country Girl, obra por la cual fue nominada al Premio Drama Desk. Su trabajo en los filmes Mississippi Burning (1988), Almost Famous (2000) y North Country (2005), le valieron nominaciones al Óscar como mejor actriz de reparto. Entre sus otras de sus cintas están Short Cuts (1993), Primal Fear (1996), Wonder Boys (2000) y Something's Gotta Give (2003).

Frances Louise McDormand (geb. Cynthia Ann Smith, 23. Juni 1957) ist eine amerikanische Film-, Bühnen- und Fernsehschauspielerin. McDormand begann ihre Karriere auf der Bühne und gab ihr Debüt auf der Leinwand im Film Blood Simple von 1984, nachdem sie seitdem in mehreren Theater- und Fernsehrollen aufgetreten war. McDormand wurde für ihre Leistungen in Mississippi Burning" (1988), Short Cuts" (1993), Fargo" (1996), Wonder Boys" (2000), Almost Famous" (2000), North Country" (2005), Moonrise Kingdom" (2012), Hail, Caesar!" ausgezeichnet. (2016) und "Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri" (2017).

Im Laufe ihrer Karriere wurde sie für acht Golden Globes, fünf Academy Awards, vier BAFTA Awards und drei Emmy Awards nominiert. Sie ist eine der wenigen Künstlerinnen, die die "Triple Crown of Acting" erreicht hat und einen Academy Award, einen Primetime Emmy Award und einen Tony Award gewonnen hat. Ihren ersten Oscar als beste Schauspielerin erhielt sie 1997 für ihre Rolle als Marge Gunderson in'Fargo'.  Sie gewann auch die beste Nebendarstellerin der Broadcast Film Critics Association, des Florida Film Critics Circle und der Los Angeles Film Critics Association für ihre Leistung in Wonder Boys" (2000). McDormand kehrte vom 8. Februar 2011 bis zum 24. April 2011 mit dem David Lindsay-Abaire-Spiel Good People on Broadway auf die Bühne zurück. Im Jahr 2017 spielte McDormand in Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri", was ihr einen zweiten Oscar als beste Schauspielerin einbrachte.

McDormand ist seit 1984 mit dem Filmemacher Joel Coen verheiratet, sie leben zusammen mit ihrem Adoptivsohn Pedro in New York City.

Une actrice américaine de cinéma, de théâtre et de télévision. McDormand a commencé sa carrière sur scène et a fait ses débuts à l'écran dans le film Blood Simple de 1984, après avoir joué depuis dans plusieurs rôles théâtraux et télévisés. McDormand a été reconnue pour ses performances dans 'Mississippi Burning' (1988), 'Short Cuts' (1993), 'Fargo' (1996), 'Wonder Boys' (2000), 'Almost Famous' (2000), 'North Country '(2005),' Moonrise Kingdom '(2012),' Salut, César! ' (2016) et " Trois panneaux d'affichage à l'extérieur d'Ebbing, Missouri " (2017).

Tout au long de sa carrière, elle a été nominée pour huit Golden Globes, cinq Oscars, quatre BAFTA Awards et trois Emmy Awards. Elle est l'une des rares interprètes à avoir obtenu la «Triple couronne d'acteur», remportant un Oscar, un Primetime Emmy Award et un Tony Award. Elle a remporté son premier Oscar de la meilleure actrice en 1997 pour son rôle de Marge Gunderson dans «Fargo». Elle a également remporté le prix de la meilleure actrice dans un second rôle de la Broadcast Film Critics Association, du Florida Film Critics Circle et de la Los Angeles Film Critics Association pour sa performance dans «Wonder Boys» (2000). McDormand est revenu sur scène dans la pièce de David Lindsay-Abaire Good People à Broadway du 8 février 2011 au 24 avril 2011. En 2017, McDormand a joué dans «Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri», ce qui lui a valu un deuxième Oscar du meilleur Actrice.

McDormand est marié au cinéaste Joel Coen depuis 1984, ils résident à New York avec leur fils adoptif Pedro

弗兰西斯·麦克多蒙德（Frances McDormand），1957年6月23日出生于美国伊利诺斯州芝加哥，美国女演员、制作人，毕业于耶鲁大学。

1984年，主演首部电影《血迷宫》，正式进入娱乐圈  。1985年，参演刑警剧《希尔街的布鲁斯》。1988年，凭借舞台剧《欲望号街车》入围第42届托尼奖戏剧类最佳女主角奖。1991年，出演惊悚电影《巴顿·芬克》。1996年，主演惊悚悬疑电影《冰血暴》，获第69届奥斯卡金像奖最佳女主角奖  。2001年，凭借犯罪电影《缺席的人》入围第28届土星奖最佳女配角奖。2005年，凭借剧情电影《北方风云》入围第78届奥斯卡金像奖最佳女配角奖  。2008年，凭借喜剧电影《阅后即焚》入围第66届美国电影电视金球奖电影类-音乐喜剧类最佳女主角奖  。2011年，凭借舞台剧《Good People》获第65届托尼奖戏剧类最佳女主角奖。2012年，主演电影《应许之地》在美国上映  。2014年，凭借人物传记剧《奥丽芙·基特里奇》获第67届艾美奖迷你剧及电视电影类最佳女主角奖  ；同年，担任犯罪电影《失踪秘闻》制片人。2018年，为喜剧动画电影《犬之岛》配音  。2018年，凭借犯罪喜剧电影《三块广告牌》获第75届美国电影电视金球奖电影类-剧情类最佳女主角奖  、第23届评论家选择奖电影类最佳女主角奖  、第24届美国演员工会奖电影类最佳女主角奖  、第71届英国电影学院奖最佳女主角奖  、第90届奥斯卡金像奖最佳女主角奖  ；2020年，凭借《无依之地》获第33届芝加哥影评人协会奖最佳女主角奖  ，第93届奥斯卡金像奖最佳女主角奖  。
data.name: 弗兰西斯·麦克多蒙德

data.biography: Frances Louise McDormand, seu registro adotivo - Cynthia Ann Smith, (Gibson, 23 de junho de 1957) é uma atriz e produtora norte-americana. Ela já recebeu vários prêmios ao longo de sua carreira, incluindo quatro Oscars (três de melhor atriz e um de melhor filme - Nomadland, de 2020, que produziu e estrelou), dois Primetime Emmy Awards e um Tony Award, sendo uma das poucas artistas a conquistar a "Tríplice Coroa da Atuação". McDormand já estrelou vários filmes dirigidos por seu marido, o cineasta Joel Coen, entre eles Gosto de Sangue (1984), Arizona Nunca Mais (1987) e Fargo.

法蘭絲·麥杜曼（Frances McDormand），1957 年 6 月 23 日出生於美國伊利諾斯州芝加哥，美國女演員、製作人，畢業於耶魯大學。

1984 年，主演首部電影《血迷宮》，正式進入娛樂圈 。1985 年，參演刑警劇《希爾街的布魯斯》。1988 年，憑藉舞台劇《慾海奇女子》入圍第 42 屆託尼獎戲劇類最佳女主角獎。1991 年，出演驚悚電影《巴頓·芬克》。1996 年，主演驚悚懸疑電影《雪花高離奇命案》，獲第 69 屆奧斯卡金像獎最佳女主角獎 。2001 年，憑藉犯罪電影《缺席的人》入圍第 28 屆土星獎最佳女配角獎。2005 年，憑藉劇情電影《北方風雲》入圍第 78 屆奧斯卡金像獎最佳女配角獎 。2008 年，憑藉喜劇電影《CIA 光碟離奇失竊案》入圍第 66 屆美國電影電視金球獎電影類 - 音樂喜劇類最佳女主角獎 。2011 年，憑藉舞台劇《Good People》獲第 65 屆託尼獎戲劇類最佳女主角獎。2012 年，主演電影《騙地謊言》在美國上映 。2014 年，憑藉人物傳記劇《奧麗芙·基特里奇》獲第 67 屆艾美獎迷你劇及電視電影類最佳女主角獎 ；同年，擔任犯罪電影《失蹤秘聞》製片人。2018 年，為喜劇動畫電影《犬之島》配音 。2018 年，憑藉犯罪喜劇電影《三塊廣告牌》獲第 75 屆美國電影電視金球獎電影類 - 劇情類最佳女主角獎 、第 23 屆評論家選擇獎電影類最佳女主角獎 、第 24 屆美國演員工會獎電影類最佳女主角獎 、第 71 屆英國電影學院獎最佳女主角獎 、第 90 屆奧斯卡金像獎最佳女主角獎 ；2020 年，憑藉《浪跡天地》獲第 33 屆芝加哥影評人協會獎最佳女主角獎 ，第 93 屆奧斯卡金像獎最佳女主角獎 。

2015 年，杉野遙亮獲得了第 12 屆 FINEBOYS 專屬模特面試的大獎，從而進入演藝界；同年，開始擔任《FINEBOYS》雜誌的專屬模特。2016 年，他參演了職場喜劇《 校閲女孩河野悦子》，從而嶄露頭角。2017 年 1 月 28 日，其出演的青春勵志傳記片《 奇蹟，那天如此重要》上映，從而獲得關注；10 月 30 日，他參演的校園愛情劇《 花豫野獸》播出。2018 年；10 月 5 日，其出演的愛情的《 那個女孩的、俘虜》上映；10 月 12 日，他參演的愛情劇《 大戀愛~和忘了我的你》播出。

2019 年，杉野遙亮出演了時代劇電影《 瞌睡的磐音》；3 月 21 日，他參演的愛情片《 鄰居同居 2》上映；10 月，出演喜劇《 我的事説來話長》；11 月 29 日，他主演的獵奇愛情喜劇片《 羊與狼的戀愛和殺人》上映。2020 年，主演電視劇《山本週五郎聯續劇 三郎》；4 月 15 日，其出演的職場劇《 派遣員的品格 2》播出。

data.biography:
台湾男艺人。高中时担任篮球校队队长，并且打过HBL，大学时期兼职当模特儿，退伍后因朋友介绍，签约TVBS 戏剧中心。曾担任多部脍炙人口歌曲MV男主角。其中最引人注目的是曾参与艾怡良《说 艾怡良》专辑中寂寞无害MV演出，因大胆全裸挑战床戏，而引起讨论。于2016年演出首部电视剧在一起，就好而开启了戏剧生涯，也增加了不少粉丝。 2017年演出稍息立正我爱你的角色-大毛，在剧中公开念出女主角日记，创造出收视率高点，引发关注度，。

　　近期在我的男孩中饰演男主角的好兄弟搞屁，三人在剧中的好感情也延续到现实中。

data.biography:
入圍第57屆金鐘獎最佳男配角，身兼演員、模特兒、主持人及導演等多重身份，為影視圈的多面手。

以廣泛的戲劇演出及主持工作，展現了多元表演風格與不拘一格的創意實力。演出多部受矚目的影視作品，代表作包括《華燈初上》，憑藉精湛演技入圍第57屆金鐘獎最佳男配角。對於作品類型及題材皆不設限，從劇情片到綜藝節目皆有亮眼表現。

近期，參與作品包括《舊金山美容院》、《都市懼集-客房清潔》、《此時此刻》、《華燈初上》、《粉紅色時光》、《姐妹們追吧》，以及公視台語台的《若是一個人》。

此外，章廣辰除了最廣為人知的演員身分，近年更參與了綜藝實境節目，近期主持《光露營就很忙了》、《光開門就很忙了》及2022全明星籃球賽等節目，持續在不同領域中發光發熱。

Se graduó en el Teatro y Cine "Caragiale I. L." clase del 2008.

Participó en la primera temporada del programa concurso Gran Hermano y se las arregló para llegar a la final. Después de este concurso tenía un programa en la televisión AtomicTV, llamado vida nocturna "Ya bebé" sobre los clubes de Bucarest.

Ha presentado en el canal OTV  un programa semanal llamado "Temprano por la mañana" (Dimineata devreme).

Altura: 165 cm

Películas: 

- De ce eu?

- Luna Verde

- Fata din Transilvania (Corto)

- Sunt o babã comunistã

Series: 

- Baleseti sebészet 

- Umbre

A absolvit Institutul de Artă Teatrală și Cinematografică "I.L. Caragiale", promotia 2008. Andreea Vasile a participat la prima serie a emisiunii concurs Big Brother. A reusit sa ajunga in finala. Dupa acest concurs a avut o emisiune la Atomic Tv, numita "Ya baby", despre viata de noapte din cluburile bucurestene.

La postul OTV a prezentat o emisiune saptamanala, alaturi de Doru Iuga. Emisiunea se numeste "Dimineata devreme".

In timpul studentiei, cand era studentă în anul al II-lea la UNATC la secția actorie, a jucat intr-unul din episoadele serialului "La urgență" rolul unei tinere de 23 de ani cu o tumoare la colon. Este primul film in care a jucat tanara actrita.

Roluri in teatru: Bobby in "Niste fete" de la Teatrul Bulandra , spectacol prezentat si la Teatrul “George Ciprian" din Buzău, "CEO" la UNATC. Tot la UNATC a jucat in "Trilogia Atrizilor", in "Corifeul" si "Electra".

La Teatrul "George Ciprian" din Buzau, gazduit de Teatrul Nottara, o intalnim in rolul Kathie din "Kathie si hipopotamul", de Mario Vargas Llosa, in piesa " Portrete de femei" de Neil LaBute, rolul Bobby.

La Gala Tânărului Actor "Hop" 2010 desfasurata la Mangalia, a interpretat un rol in comedia "Women in motion", de Donald Margulies, alaturi de Diana Cavallioti.

A jucat si in filmele: "Luna verde" - Productie Castel Film + CNC. România (2010), rolul Irina; Bani (2008) - candidata la postul de actrita porno; "Eu" (2008); "Nasterea unei capodopere" (2008); O noua casa (2007).
data.name: Andreea Vasile

data.biography:
William George Zane Junior 1966 február 24-én született Chicagóban , Illinoisban, az Egyesült Államokban. Szülei, William George és Thalia Zane, mindketten görög származásúak. Billynek egy testvére van, Lisa Zane, aki szintén a színészi hivatást választotta.

A görög katolikus vallásban nevelkedett színész Amerikában és Svájcban tanult, és már korán érdekelni kezdte a színpad. A középiskola befejezése után Kaliforniába ment, hogy szerencsét próbáljon, és három héten belül rámosolygott a szerencse, amikor megkapta a Vissza a jövőbe (1985) egyik szerepét, majd szerepelt a Rémecskék (1986) című filmben és a Vissza a jövőbe 2.-ben (1989) is.

A sci-fi filmeket és szerepeket előszeretettel vállaló Zane nagyjátékfilmjei után több tévéfilmben és sorozatban kapott szerepet: 1991-től játszott David Lynch kultikus szériájában, a Twin Peaksben.

Közben olyan filmekben tűnt fel, mint a Lopakodók (1993), a Hazug igazság (1993), a Kódneve: Delilah (1993) vagy a Mesék a kriptából: Démon lovag (1995).

Alakított képregényhőst A fantom (1996) című feldolgozásban, és játszott Kate Winslet és Leonardo DiCaprio oldalán James Cameron Titanicjában (1997) is.

A sokáig főleg B-listás filmekben szereplő színész kritikai elismerésre is szert tett A hitetlen (2001) című filmjével, és több katonai témájú produkcióban is feltűnt (Farkasok völgye: Irak, 2006, Az utolsó bevetés, 2006, Darfur, 2009).

A színész legutóbbi filmje The Ganzfeld Haunting (2014).

Billy 1989-ben vette el feleségül Lisa Collins színésznőt, akit a Halálos nyugalom (1989) című film forgatásán ismert meg. A pár 1995-ben vált el. Zane azóta számtalan barátnő mellett próbált meg lehorgonyozni. Jelenleg Candice Neil modellel alkot egy párt, akitől két lánya született.

Billy Zane (* 24. Februar 1966 in Chicago, Illinois als William George Zane, Jr.) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler.

Seine erste prominente Rolle auf der Leinwand war die des Match, eines Freundes von Biff Tannen, in den ersten beiden Teilen der Zurück-in-die-Zukunft-Trilogie. Erste besondere Aufmerksamkeit erlangte er durch seine Rolle des irren Hughie Warriner in dem australischen Spielfilm Todesstille. Bekannt wurde er aber vor allem durch den Blockbuster Titanic, in dem er den arroganten Cal Hockley verkörperte. Im Tal der Wölfe – Irak gab er als amerikanischer Kriegsverbrecher den Gegenspieler des Helden. Im Fernsehen war er in wiederkehrenden Rollen in den Serien Twin Peaks, Boston Public und Charmed – Zauberhafte Hexen zu sehen. Sein Schaffen umfasst mehr als 140 Film- und Fernsehproduktionen.

Quelle: Wikipedia

William George Zane Jr (né le 24 février 1966) est un acteur, peintre et producteur américain. Il a joué l'antagoniste Caledon Hockley dans le film épique et romantique Titanic (1997). Parmi ses autres films, citons Retour vers le futur (1985) et sa suite Retour vers le futur II (1989), Dead Calm (1989), la série télévisée Twin Peaks (1991), Tombstone (1993), Demon Knight (1995), The Phantom (1996) et le jeu vidéo Kingdom Hearts (2002).

William George Zane Jr. (Chicago, 24 de fevereiro de 1966), mais conhecido como Billy Zane, é um ator norte-americano, famoso pelos papéis como o herói dos quadrinhos Fantasma, em The Phantom, Cal Hockley em Titanic e John Wheeler na série para a TV Twin Peaks. Ele tem uma irmã mais velha, Lisa Zane, que é atriz. Depois de completar um ano no exterior da Escola Americana, na Suíça, Zane se formou na Escola Francis W. Parker e foi aluno do Harand Camp de Artes Cênicas, localizado em Kenosha, Wisconsin. Billy Zane foi casado com a atriz Lisa Collins, de 1989, até que o casal se divorciou em 1995.

data.biography:
Hrithik Roshan is an Indian actor who appears in Bollywood films.  After having appeared in films as a child actor in the 1980s, Roshan made his film debut in a leading role in Kaho Naa... Pyaar Hai (2000) for which Roshan earned his Filmfare Awards for Best Actor and Best Male Debut. In 2001, he went on to appear in the melodrama Kabhi Khushi Kabhie Gham..., which became India's highest-grossing film in the overseas market and his biggest commercial success to date.

Following through with several unnoticed performances from 2002–03, he starred in the commercially successful Koi... Mil Gaya and its sequel Krrish, both of which won him numerous Best Actor awards.Roshan received his third Filmfare Award for Best Actor in 2006 for his performance in the action film Dhoom 2. He later received critical acclaim for his performance in Jodhaa Akbar, for which he received his first international award at the Golden Minbar International Film Festival. These accomplishments have established him as a leading contemporary actor of Hindi cinema.
data.name: Hrithik Roshan

data.biography:
Hrithik Roshan ist ein indischer Schauspieler, der in Bollywood-Filmen mitwirkt. Nachdem Roshan in den 1980er Jahren als Kinderdarsteller in Filmen aufgetreten war, gab er sein Filmdebüt in einer Hauptrolle in Kaho Naa..... Pyaar Hai (2000), für den Roshan seine Filmfare Awards für den besten Schauspieler und das beste männliche Debüt erhielt. Im Jahr 2001 trat er dann in dem Melodrama Kabhi Khushi Kabhie Gham.... auf, das zum erfolgreichsten Film Indiens auf dem Überseemarkt und seinem bisher größten kommerziellen Erfolg wurde.

Nach mehreren unbemerkten Auftritten von 2002-03 spielte er in den kommerziell erfolgreichen Koi..... Mil Gaya und seine Fortsetzung Krrish, die ihm beide zahlreiche Best Actor Awards einbrachten. 2006 erhielt Roshan seinen dritten Filmfare Award for Best Actor für seine Leistung im Actionfilm Dhoom 2, später erhielt er für seine Leistung in Jodhaa Akbar, für die er seine erste internationale Auszeichnung beim Golden Minbar International Film Festival erhielt. Diese Erfolge haben ihn als einen der führenden zeitgenössischen Schauspieler des Hindi-Kinos etabliert.

data.biography:
Vincent Pastore (* 14. Juli 1946 in der Bronx, New York City) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler italienischer Abstammung. Sehr bekannt wurde er in der Rolle des schwergewichtigen Mafiosos Salvatore „Big Pussy“ Bonpensiero in der erfolgreichen HBO-Fernsehserie Die Sopranos.

Zwischen 1967 und 1987 besaß Pastore mehrere Nachtclubs in New Rochelle, New York. Zwei seiner damaligen Gäste, die Schauspieler Matt Dillon und Kevin Dillon überzeugten ihn, selbst Schauspieler zu werden. Seine ersten Rollen bekam er in Filmen wie Martin Scorseses Good Fellas – Drei Jahrzehnte in der Mafia und Brian De Palmas Carlito’s Way. Insgesamt spielte er in über 70 Filmen und Fernsehproduktionen mit. Darüber hinaus spielt Pastore auch am Off-Broadway-Theater.

data.biography: Винсент Пасторе - американский актёр кино и телевидения, известный, главным образом, благодаря роли Сальваторе «Биг Пусси» Бонпенсьеро в сериале «Клан Сопрано». Пасторе родился в Бронксе, Нью-Йорк в итало-американской семье. Вырос в Нью-Рошелле. После окончания средней школы служил в ВМС Соединённых Штатов, а затем в течение трёх лет учился в Университете Пейс. В начале своего актёрского пути Пасторе играл небольшие роли в сериалах и в некоторых довольно знаменитых фильмах (среди них, например, - «Славные парни», «Путь Карлито» и «Дневники баскетболиста»). Популярность к Винсенту пришла в 1999 году после выходы на экраны телесериала «Клан Сопрано». Ему досталась роль одного из друзей главного героя - Сальваторе Бонпенсьеро по прозвищу «Биг Пусси». Несмотря на то, что Пасторе пробыл в основном касте сериала только два сезона, позже он снялся ещё в нескольких эпизодах как специально приглашённый актёр. Помимо этого, Пасторе после снимался и в других известных проектах: в сериалах «Практика», «Лас-Вегас», «Все ненавидят Криса»[4], в фильмах «Мошенники» (2002), «Револьвер» (2005), «Малавита» (2013) и других. Благодаря своей внешности и харизме, Пасторе часто играл бандитов и мафиози.
data.name: Винсент Пасторе

data.biography:
Paul Donald Wight II is a European American professional basketball player, professional wrestler and actor. He is signed to All Elite Wrestling (AEW) as an in-ring performer, and as a commentator for its web television show, AEW Dark: Elevation, under his real name of Paul Wight. He is best known for his tenure with World Championship Wrestling (WCW) from 1995 to 1999 as The Giant and with WWE from 1999 to 2021 under the ring name Big Show. He is 7’4” and weighs 550 lbs. He wears size 24 10E shoes

Wight began his career in 1994. In 1995 he signed with WCW, where, due to his very large frame, he was known by the ring name The Giant (and was initially introduced as "the son of André the Giant"). In early 1999, he left WCW to join WWE. Between WWE and WCW, he is a seven-time world champion, having held the WCW World Heavyweight Championship twice, the WWE Championship twice, WWE's World Heavyweight Championship twice and the ECW World Heavyweight Championship once, making him the only wrestler who has won all four titles. He is also an 11-time world tag team champion, holding the World, WWE and WCW World Tag Team Championships multiple times with various partners. Having also won the Intercontinental, United States and Hardcore championships, he is the 24th Triple Crown and 12th Grand Slam winner in WWE history. He also won the 60-man battle royal at World War 3 and the 30-man André the Giant Memorial Battle Royal at WrestleMania 31. He has headlined multiple pay-per-view events for WCW and WWF/WWE since 1995, including the 2000 edition of WWE's premier annual event, WrestleMania.

Outside of professional wrestling, Wight has appeared in feature films and television series such as Jingle All the Way, The Waterboy, Star Trek: Enterprise, and two USA Network's comedy-dramas Royal Pains, Psych and the action-drama Burn Notice. He had lead roles in the WWE Studios comedy film Knucklehead and the Netflix sitcom The Big Show Show.
data.name: Paul Wight

data.biography:
Taissa Farmiga (born August 17, 1994) is an American actress. Born in Whitehouse Station, New Jersey, she is the younger sister of actress Vera Farmiga. Her numerous appearances in horror films have established her as a scream queen.

Farmiga was encouraged to begin acting by her sister, and subsequently made her debut in her sister's film Higher Ground (2011). Thereafter, she rose to prominence for her work on the anthology series American Horror Story, starring in the seasons Murder House (2011), Coven (2013–2014), Roanoke (2016) and Apocalypse (2018). Her early film roles include the romantic comedy At Middleton (2013), the crime drama The Bling Ring (2013) and the psychological thriller Mindscape (2013), the latter of which was her first starring film role.

Farmiga was lauded for her performances in the comedy slasher film The Final Girls (2015), and the drama films 6 Years (2015) and Share (2015), all of which premiered at South by Southwest, which led her to be named one of the breakout stars of the festival. She has also provided the voice of Raven in the DC Animated Movie Universe (2016–2020), starred in the comedy films Rules Don't Apply (2016) and The Long Dumb Road (2018), the drama films In a Valley of Violence (2016) and What They Had (2018) and the supernatural thriller film The Nun (2018). Farmiga headlined the procedural drama series Wicked City (2015), and made her stage debut in the off-Broadway revival of the drama play Buried Child (2016).
data.name: Taissa Farmiga

data.biography:
Taissa Farmiga (* 17. August 1994 in Whitehouse Station, New Jersey) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin. Sie wurde ist die jüngere Schwester der Schauspielerin Vera Farmiga. Durch ihre zahlreichen Auftritte in Horrorfilmen hat sie sich als Scream Queen etabliert.

Farmiga wurde von ihrer Schwester dazu ermutigt, mit der Schauspielerei zu beginnen, und gab anschließend ihr Debüt in dem Film Higher Ground – Der Ruf nach Gott (2011) ihrer Schwester. Danach wurde sie durch ihre Arbeit an der Anthologie-Serie American Horror Story bekannt, in der sie in den Staffeln Murder House (2011), Coven (2013–2014), Roanoke (2016) und Apocalypse (2018) mitspielte. Zu ihren frühen Filmrollen zählen die romantische Komödie Ein Tag in Middleton (2013), das Krimidrama The Bling Ring (2013) und der Psychothriller Mindscape (2013), wobei letzterer ihre erste Hauptrolle in einem Film war.

Farmiga wurde für ihre Darstellungen in dem Comedy-Slasher-Film The Final Girls (2015) und den Dramen 6 Jahre (2015) und Share (2015) gelobt, die alle auf dem South by Southwest Festival Premiere feierten, was ihr den Titel einer der Durchstarterinnen des Festivals einbrachte. Außerdem lieh sie Raven im DC Animated Movie Universe (2016–2020) ihre Stimme, spielte in den Komödien Regeln spielen keine Rolle (2016) und The Long Dumb Road (2018), den Dramen In a Valley of Violence (2016) und What They Had – Abschied für immer (2018) sowie dem übernatürlichen Thriller The Nun (2018) mit. Farmiga spielte die Hauptrolle in der Krimiserie Wicked City (2015) und gab ihr Bühnendebüt in der Off-Broadway-Wiederaufführung des Dramas Buried Child (2016).

Taissa jest najmłodszą z siedmiorga rodzeństwa. We wczesnym dzieciństwie nie marzyła o zostaniu aktorką, ale jej starsza o 21 lat siostra, Vera Farmiga przekonała Taissę, aby wystąpiła w jej reżyserskim debiucie Higher Ground. Grająca główną rolę Vera poszukiwała kogoś fizycznie do siebie podobnego, kto mógłby zagrać młodszą wersję jej postaci. Taissa miała wówczas 15 lat i oprócz przedstawień szkolnych, nie posiadała żadnego doświadzenia aktorskiego. Film został zaprezentowany na Festiwalu Filmowym w Sundance i otrzymał świetne recenzje. Po tym wydarzeniu Taissa zdecydowała się na połączenie swojej przyszłości z grą w filmach. W wieku 16 lat dołączyła do obsady serialu American Horror Story.

Taissa Farmiga (nascida em 17 de agosto de 1994) é uma atriz americana. Ela começou sua carreira no cinema no drama Higher Ground (2011), e posteriormente fez sua estréia na televisão na série FX American Horror Story: Murder House (2011). Farmiga fez sua estreia nos palcos na remontagem Off-Broadway da peça dramática Buried Child (2016). Ela é a irmã mais nova da atriz Vera Farmiga.

Η Τάισα Φαρμίγκα (γεννημένη στις 17 Αυγούστου 1994) είναι Αμερικανίδα ηθοποιός. Ξεκίνησε την καριέρα της στον κινηματογράφο στο δράμα Higher Ground (2011) και στη συνέχεια έκανε το τηλεοπτικό της ντεμπούτο στη σειρά του FX American Horror Story: Murder House (2011). Η Φαρμίγκα έκανε το ντεμπούτο της στη σκηνή στην Off-Broadway αναβίωση του δραματικού έργου Buried Child (2016). Είναι η μικρότερη αδελφή της ηθοποιού Βέρα Φαρμίγκα.
data.name: Τάισα Φαρμίγκα

data.biography:
Таїсса Фармі́ґа – американська актриса. Народилася в містечку Вайтхаус-Стейшен, штат Нью-Джерсі. Вона молодша сестра актриси Віри Фарміґи. Її численні виступи в жахах встановили її як королеву крику. Фарміґу заохочувала до акторської діяльності її сестра, після чого Таїса дебютувала в фільмі своєї сестри "Higher Ground" (2011). Пізніше вона стала відомою завдяки своїй роботі в антології "American Horror Story", де вона зіграла в сезонах "Murder House" (2011), "Coven" (2013–2014), "Roanoke" (2016) та "Apocalypse" (2018).

Її ранні ролі в кіно включають романтичну комедію "At Middleton" (2013), кримінальну драму "The Bling Ring" (2013) та психологічний трилер "Mindscape" (2013), останній з яких став її першою головною роллю в кіно. Фарміґу було високо оцінено за її ролі в комедійному фільмі жахів "The Final Girls" (2015), а також в драмах "6 Years" (2015) та "Share" (2015), всі які були презентовані на фестивалі South by Southwest, завдяки чому її назвали однією з зірок, що проривається. Вона також подавала голос для Рейвен в кіно-всесвіті DC Animated Movie (2016–2020), грала в комедійних фільмах "Rules Don't Apply" (2016) та "The Long Dumb Road" (2018), драмах "In a Valley of Violence" (2016) та "What They Had" (2018) та в фільмі жахів "The Nun" (2018). Фарміґа була основною зіркою драми "Wicked City" (2015) і дебютувала на сцені в драмі "Buried Child" (2016) за межами Бродвею.
data.name: Таісса Фарміга

Taissa Farmiga, 17 Ağustos 1994 tarihinde Readington, New Jersey, ABD'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Ukraynalı göçmen bir ailenin yedi çocuğundan en küçüğü olan Farmiga, ünlü aktris ve yönetmen Vera Farmiga'nın kız kardeşidir. Çocukluk yıllarında oyunculuğa pek ilgi duymayan ve başlangıçta muhasebeci olmayı hedefleyen Taissa, ablasının teşvikiyle bu fikrini değiştirdi. Kariyerine, ablası Vera Farmiga'nın ilk yönetmenlik denemesi olan bağımsız drama "Higher Ground" (2011) filminde, ablasının karakterinin gençliğini canlandırarak adım attı. Sundance Film Festivali'nde prömiyer yapan bu filmdeki doğal performansı, onun sektörde fark edilmesini sağladı.

Ancak Taissa Farmiga'yı geniş kitlelere tanıtan ve kariyerinde bir dönüm noktası olan proje, Ryan Murphy'nin kült korku antolojisi dizisi "American Horror Story" oldu. Dizinin ilk sezonu olan "Murder House"da (2011) canlandırdığı sorunlu genç kız Violet Harmon karakteriyle eleştirmenlerden ve izleyicilerden tam not aldı. Bu rol, onu bir anda "çığlık kraliçesi" (scream queen) adaylarından biri haline getirdi. Dizinin üçüncü sezonu "Coven"da (2013) genç cadı Zoe Benson rolüyle geri döndü ve daha sonra "Roanoke" (2016) ile "Apocalypse" (2018) sezonlarında da yer alarak serinin ikonik yüzlerinden biri oldu.

Televizyon başarısının yanı sıra sinema kariyerine de ağırlık veren Farmiga, Sofia Coppola'nın yönettiği "Pırıltılı Hayatlar" (The Bling Ring) (2013) filminde Emma Watson ile birlikte rol aldı. Ardından, kült statüsüne erişen korku-komedi filmi "The Final Girls" (2015), romantik drama "6 Years" (2015) ve western türündeki "In a Valley of Violence" (2016) gibi farklı türlerdeki yapımlarda çok yönlülüğünü sergiledi. Clint Eastwood'un yönettiği ve başrolünde oynadığı "Kaçakçı" (The Mule) (2018) filminde de yer alarak dramatik yeteneklerini kanıtladı.

Farmiga'nın kariyerindeki en büyük ticari başarılardan biri, ablasının da merkezinde olduğu "Korku Seansı" (The Conjuring) evrenine dahil olmasıyla geldi. Evrenin spin-off filmi olan "Dehşetin Yüzü" (The Nun) (2018) filminde Rahibe Irene karakterine hayat verdi. Film, eleştirmenlerden karışık yorumlar alsa da gişede büyük bir başarı elde etti. Farmiga, bu rolü 2023 yapımı devam filmi "The Nun II"de tekrar canlandırdı. Son dönemde ise HBO'nun beğenilen dönem draması "The Gilded Age" (2022-günümüz) dizisinde Gladys Russell karakteriyle izleyici karşısına çıkarak tarihi yapımlardaki başarısını da gözler önüne sermektedir. Başlangıçta planlamadığı bir kariyer yolunda ilerlemesine rağmen, Farmiga kendine has oyunculuk stiliyle Hollywood'un saygın genç yetenekleri arasında yerini almıştır.

Mary Stockley is a British stage, television and film actress.

A former member of the National Youth Music Theatre, Stockley studied drama at university. She made her first television appearance in 2001 in the TV film Being Dom Joly, in 2002, going on to play Kate Matherson in thirty episodes of Family Affairs on Five. Stockley played Josie Turner in The Body in the Library- Agatha Christie's Marple (2004), Gina Way in Jericho (2005), Edie Covington in The Inspector Lynley Mysteries (2006), Mrs. Clay in Persuasion (2007), Tess in Britz (2007), Miss Jay in Ballet Shoes (2007), and Eve Carpenter in Mrs. McGinty's Dead- Agatha Christie's Poirot (2008).

Her film appearances include Ruth Ellis in Pierrepoint (2005), Ruth in V for Vendetta (2006), Kate in Artifacts (2007), Michelle in 7 Lives (2011), Mrs. Fisher in The Woman in Black (2012), Ana in I Spit on Your Grave 2 (2013), and Assistant in Diana (2013).She also voices characters in Star Wars: The Old Republic.

Stockley's theatre credits include Oliver!; Merrily We Roll Along (2000) at the Donmar Warehouse; Hope Harcourt in the musical Anything Goes (2002) and Katherine in Love's Labour's Lost (2003), both the latter at the Royal National Theatre. In 2008, she played Marigold in The Common Pursuit at the Menier Chocolate Factory. She played Judy in the National Theatre's production of The Curious Incident of the Dog in the Night-Time.
data.name: Mary Stockley

Bill Bailey (born Mark Bailey; January 13, 1964) is an English stand-up comedian, musician and actor. As well as his extensive stand-up work, Bailey is well known for his appearances on Have I Got News for You, Never Mind the Buzzcocks, QI and Black Books.

Bailey was listed by The Observer as one of the 50 funniest acts in British comedy in 2003. In 2007 and again in 2010, he was voted the 7th greatest stand-up comic on Channel 4's 100 Greatest Stand-Ups. Bill Bailey is a patron of International Animal Rescue.

data.biography: Gina Torres (born April 25, 1969) is an American television and movie actress. She is known for her roles in science fiction and fantasy. She has appeared in many television series, including Hercules: The Legendary Journeys (as Nebula), Xena: Warrior Princess (as Cleopatra), the short-lived Cleopatra 2525, as well as Alias (as Anna Espinosa), Firefly (as series regular Zoe Washburne), Angel (as Jasmine), The Matrix sequels in a supporting role, and The Shield. She also starred in the award-winning independent film South of Pico as the fragile waitress, Carla.

data.biography: Gina Torres (geboren am 25. April 1969) ist eine amerikanische Fernseh- und Filmschauspielerin. Sie ist bekannt für ihre Rollen in Science Fiction und Fantasy. Sie hat in vielen Fernsehserien mitgewirkt, darunter auch in Herkules: The Legendary Journeys (als Nebel), Xena: Warrior Princess (als Kleopatra), die kurzlebige Kleopatra 2525, sowie Alias (als Anna Espinosa), Firefly (als serienmäßige Zoe Washburne), Angel (als Jasmin), The Matrix Fortsetzungen in einer Nebenrolle und The Shield. Gina Torres  (25 de abril de 1969) es una actriz estadounidense de origen cubano-puertorriqueño, conocida por sus actuaciones en géneros como la ciencia ficción o la fantasía.

Gina Torres (New York, 1969. április 25. –) amerikai színésznő. Ő alakította Zoe Washburne főszerepét a Firefly (2002–2003) sci-fi sorozatban és annak Serenity (2005) című játékfilmes folytatásában, valamint Jessica Pearsont az USA Network jogi drámasorozatában, a Briliáns elmékben (2011–2018) és annak spin-off sorozatában, a Pearsonban (2019). Jelenleg a 9-1-1: Lone Star című sorozat főszereplője.

Torres feltűnt a Mátrix – Újratöltve és Mátrix – Forradalmak című sci-fi filmekben (mindkettő 2003), a Jam című drámafilmben (2006), az I Think I Love My Wife című romantikus vígjátékban (2007), a South of Pico című független drámafilmben (2007), valamint a Selah and the Spades című drámafilmben (2019).

Színészi pályafutása során Torres számos televíziós sorozatban szerepelt mellékszerepben, többek között a Herkules: A legendás utazások, a Xena: A harcos hercegnő, a Cleopatra 2525, az Alias, az Angyal, 24, a The Shield – Kemény zsaruk, a Gossip Girl – A pletykafészek, a Vámpírnaplók, a Hannibal Diaries és a Westworld címűekben.

吉娜·托瑞斯（Gina Torres，1969年4月25日-），美国电视和电影女演员。她以在科幻小说和奇幻小说中的角色而闻名。她曾出演过许多电视剧，包括《赫拉克勒斯：传奇之旅》（饰演星云）、《赛娜：战士公主》（饰演克利奥帕特拉）、短命的克利奥帕特拉 2525，以及《别名》（饰演安娜·埃斯皮诺萨）、《萤火虫》（饰演系列常规佐伊·沃什伯恩）、天使（饰演茉莉花）、《黑客帝国》续集配角和盾牌。她还出演了屡获殊荣的独立电影《皮克南部》，饰演脆弱的女服务员卡拉。

Marcel Iureş (born August 2, 1951) is a Romanian stage and screen actor.

Iureş was born 2 August 1951 in Băileşti, Romania and is one of Romania's most acclaimed stage and film actors. Iureş entered the Institutul de Arta Teatrala si Cinematografica in Bucharest in 1974 and graduated in 1978. He has acted in films and on stage both in Romania and internationally, as well as playing at least ten roles on Romanian and British television.

data.biography:
Wayne Morris  (February 17, 1914 – September 14, 1959), born Bert DeWayne Morris in Los Angeles, was an American film and television actor, as well as a decorated World War II fighter ace. He appeared in many notable films, including Paths of Glory (1957), The Bushwackers (1952) and the title role of Kid Galahad in 1937. While filming Flight Angels (1940), Morris became interested in flying and became a pilot. With war in the wind, he joined the Naval Reserve and became a Navy flier in 1942, leaving his film career behind for the duration of the war. Flying the F6F Hellcat off the aircraft carrier USS Essex, Morris shot down seven Japanese planes and contributed to the sinking of five ships. He was awarded four Distinguished Flying Crosses and two Air Medals. Morris was considered by the Navy as physically 'too big' to fly fighters. After being turned down several times as a fighter pilot, he went to his brother in law, Cdr. David McCampbell, imploring him for the chance to fly fighters. Cdr. McCampbell said "Give me a letter." He flew with the VF-15, the famed "McCampbell Heroes." He married Patricia O'Rourke, an Olympic swimmer, and sister to B-movie actress Peggy Stewart. Following the war, Morris returned to films, but his nearly four-year absence had cost him his burgeoning stardom. He continued to act in movies, but the pictures, for the most part, sank in quality. Losing his boyish looks but not demeanor, Morris spent most of the fifties in low-budget westerns. He made an unusual career move in 1957, making his Broadway debut as a washed-up boxing champ in William Saroyan's The Cave Dwellers. He also appeared as a weakling in Stanley Kubrick's Paths of Glory (1957). Morris suffered a massive heart attack while visiting aboard the aircraft carrier USS Bon Homme Richard in San Francisco Bay and was pronounced dead after being transported to Oakland Naval Hospital in Oakland, California. He was 45. He was buried at Arlington National Cemetery.

韦恩·莫里斯（Wayne Morris，1914年2月17日-1959年9月14日），原名伯特·德韦恩·莫里斯（Bert DeWayne Morris），美国影视演员，二战战机王牌功勋。他出演了许多著名的电影，包括《光荣之路》（1957 年）、《布什瓦克一家》（1952 年）和 1937 年《加拉哈德小子》的主角。在拍摄《飞行天使》（1940）时，莫里斯对飞行产生了兴趣，并成为了一名飞行员。随着战争的到来，他加入了海军预备役，并于 1942 年成为一名海军飞行员，在战争期间放弃了他的电影生涯。莫里斯驾驶F6F地狱猫从埃塞克斯号航空母舰上起飞，击落了七架日本飞机，并导致五艘船沉没。他被授予四枚杰出飞行十字勋章和两枚空军勋章。莫里斯被海军认为身体“太大”而无法驾驶战斗机。在作为战斗机飞行员多次被拒绝后，他去找他的姐夫大卫·麦坎贝尔（David McCampbell）博士，恳求他有机会驾驶战斗机。麦坎贝尔说：“给我一封信。他与著名的“麦坎贝尔英雄”VF-15一起飞行。他娶了奥运游泳运动员帕特里夏·奥罗克（Patricia O'Rourke），她是B级电影女演员佩吉·斯图尔特（Peggy Stewart）的妹妹。战争结束后，莫里斯重返电影界，但他近四年的缺席使他失去了崭露头角的明星地位。他继续出演电影，但大部分照片的质量都下降了。莫里斯失去了孩子气的外表，但没有举止，五十年代的大部分时间里，莫里斯都在低成本的西部片中度过。1957 年，他做出了不同寻常的职业举动，在威廉·萨罗扬 （William Saroyan） 的《洞穴居民》中以洗刷的拳击冠军的身份首次亮相百老汇。他还在斯坦利·库布里克的《光荣之路》（1957 年）中以弱者的身份出现。莫里斯在旧金山湾的航空母舰 USS Bon Homme Richard 上访问时心脏病发作，在被送往加利福尼亚州奥克兰的奥克兰海军医院后被宣布死亡。他45岁。他被安葬在阿灵顿国家公墓。

金泰希（韩语：김태희，1980年3月29日—），名字常被误写为金泰熙，韩国女演员。釜山广域市出生，蔚山女子高中、首尔大学服装设计学系（2005年）毕业。金泰希毕业于韩国“最高学府”首尔大学，学生时期成绩优异，是演艺圈内少数拥有高学历且非戏剧科班出身的演员。有“韩国最美女艺人”、“第一天然美女”等美誉。广告模特出身的她在业内素有“广告女王”的称号，出道以来拍摄过许多为观众所熟悉的经典广告。

　　金泰熙最早曾在2001年《礼物》中扮演李英爱的中学生时代，2002年在短篇电影《城市人》及情景喜剧《Let's go》出现过。2003年作为第一主角出演了SBS电视剧《梦想的屏幕》，饰演一名在电影制作领域心怀梦想努力生活的天才制作人。从家庭长剧《兴夫家的葫芦开了》中的乖巧少女到《天国的阶梯》里的蛇蝎女人，一转眼又成为《爱在哈佛》里那个奔跑在哈佛美丽校园里的医学院女学生。从神秘遥远的《中天》到极赋个性的《打架》，再到紧张刺激又深情款款的《IRIS》以及天真烂漫的《我的公主》，金泰希都演绎的活灵活现。无论是坏女人角色，还是知性女生，或是传奇人物，都把握的恰到好处，让人印象深刻。

　　荧幕上的金泰希是美丽而又耀眼的演员，私底下的她确实个安静懂事的女生。可以很真实的说，金泰希的戏剧出镜率并不高，宣传力度也并不如80后其他女星那么高调，但却赢得不亚于任何女星的关注率和曝光率，无论是在韩国还是首尔。这就是金泰希最无法取代和超越的地方。
data.name: 金泰希

金泰希（韓語：김태희，1980 年 3 月 29 日—），名字常被誤寫為金泰熙，韓國女演員。釜山廣域市出生，蔚山女子高中、首爾大學服裝設計學系（2005 年）畢業。金泰希畢業於韓國“最高學府”首爾大學，學生時期成績優異，是演藝圈內少數擁有高學歷且非戲劇科班出身的演員。有“韓國最美女藝人”、“第一天然美女”等美譽。廣告模特出身的她在業內素有“廣告女王”的稱號，出道以來拍攝過許多為觀眾所熟悉的經典廣告。

金泰熙最早曾在 2001 年《禮物》中扮演李英愛的中學生時代，2002 年在短篇電影《城市人》及情景喜劇《Let's go》出現過。2003 年作為第一主角出演了 SBS 電視劇《夢想的屏幕》，飾演一名在電影製作領域心懷夢想努力生活的天才製作人。從家庭長劇《興夫家的葫蘆開了》中的乖巧少女到《天國的階梯》裏的蛇蠍女人，一轉眼又成為《愛在哈佛》里那個奔跑在哈佛美麗校園裏的醫學院女學生。從神秘遙遠的《中天》到極賦個性的《打架》，再到緊張刺激又深情款款的《IRIS》以及天真爛漫的《我的公主》，金泰希都演繹的活靈活現。無論是壞女人角色，還是知性女生，或是傳奇人物，都把握的恰到好處，讓人印象深刻。

熒幕上的金泰希是美麗而又耀眼的演員，私底下的她確實個安靜懂事的女生。可以很真實的説，金泰希的戲劇出鏡率並不高，宣傳力度也並不如 80 後其他女星那麼高調，但卻贏得不亞於任何女星的關注率和曝光率，無論是在韓國還是首爾。這就是金泰希最無法取代和超越的地方。

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Rodney Hicks (born March 28, 1974, Montgomery Township, Pennsylvania) is an American stage and television actor.

Raised in Philadelphia, he graduated from Roxborough High School in 1992 and left college in 1994 to pursue acting as a full time career. Shortly, he made his Broadway debut as part of the original cast of the hit landmark musical Rent. Before that, he earned early success performing alongside Lauryn Hill from the hip/hop group The Fugees in the musical Bring in the Morning - A Wake up Call followed by the John Adams and June Jordan pop opera I Was Looking at the Ceiling and Then I Saw the Sky which was directed by acclaimed director Peter Sellars. He made his second appearance on Broadway in the 2000 revival of Jesus Christ Superstar playing the role of Peter and also starred in the revival of Charles Strouse's Golden Boy in the Sammy Davis Jr. role of Joe Bonaparte. He was last seen Off-Broadway in the 2006 revival of Jacques Brel is Alive and Well and Living in Paris and can be heard on the new cast recording.

He has appeared in top regional theatres across the country varying in plays from King Lear, Lobby Hero through to Ain't Misbehavin' and Two Gentlemen of Verona. His memorable TV turns has been as Delray Williams in NYPD Blue opposite Rick Schroder, the guest lead Jerome Davis in an episode of Law & Order: Criminal Intent and more recently playing opposite Faith Ford and Johnny Galecki as Perry on the last season of ABC's Hope and Faith.

Rodney returned to the Broadway cast of Rent in 2008 as Benjamin Coffin III. He was the final actor to play the role in the original Broadway production which closed that year. His performance was recorded in RENT: Filmed Live on Broadway.

Rodney recently played the role of Clarence Norris in Kander & Ebb's New Musical 'The Scottsboro Boys' which was directed and choreographed by Tony Award Winner Susan Stroman at Off-Broadway's Vineyard Theatre. The show ran from Feb - April 18. It will be playing a follow up production at The Guthrie Theatre in Minneapolis, Minnesota July 31 - September 25. The show has received 9 Drama Desk Nominations including Best New Musical, 6 Outer Critics Circle Awards including Best New Musical and is the winner of two Lucille Lortel Awards including Outstanding New Musical and Outstanding Choreography. The show opened on Broadway October 31, 2010 after beginning previews on the 6th of that month. It closed December 12, 2010.

Onika Tanya Maraj (born December 8, 1982) is a Trinidadian-born American rapper, singer and songwriter, as well as an actress and voice actress. Known professionally as Nicki Minaj, she is hailed as the most famous female rapper in the planet, notably acclaimed for her versatility as an artist, her sharp lyrics and animated flow in her rapping, including alter egos and hyper accents.

As a small child, Minaj lived with her grandmother in Saint James, Trinidad and Tobego until moving to New York City to live with her parents when she was five years old. Her father, Robert Maraj, a financial executive and part-time gospel singer, is of Indo-Trinidadian and Afro-Trinidadian descent, while her mother, Carol Maraj, also a gospel singer, is of Afro-Trinidadian ancestry.

Minaj graduated from the LaGuardia High School in Manhattan, which focuses on visual and performing arts with the intention to become an actress, and in 2001 was cast in the Off-Broadway play 'In Case You Forget'. Nicki Minaj earned public attention after releasing three mixtapes between 2007 and 2009, signing to Young Money Entertainment and outshining other artists in her infamous features all before the release of her first studio album 'Pink Friday' in 2010, which skyrocketed her into a global and cultural icon, her influence, popularity and acclaim only growing to cement her as an icon of over the course of the decade. She is the most followed rapper of all time on the social media platform, Instagram.

Nicki Minaj made her film debut in a voice acting role for the 2012 animated film 'Ice Age: Continental Drift', followed by supporting roles in 'The Other Woman' (2014) and a voice acting role in 'Angry Birds Movie 2' (2019). She has appeared as self-archive footage in multiple films and documentaries, and stated in early 2022 her intention to return her focus to acting with her biggest role to date.

Jackie Cooper (September 15, 1922 –May 3, 2011) was an American actor. He is best known for his role of Perry White in the Christopher Reeves Superman films (1978–1987).

He with the Navy in the South Pacific toward the end of World War  II and then, quietly and without publicity or fanfare, compiled one of the most distinguished peacetime military careers of anyone in his  profession. In 1961, as his weekly TV series Hennesey  (1959) was enhancing naval recruiting efforts, accepted a commission as  a line officer in the Naval Reserve with duties in recruitment,  training films, and public relations.  Holder of a multi-engine pilot  license, he later co-piloted jet planes for the Navy, which made him an  Honorary Aviator authorized to wear wings of gold-at the time only the  third so honored in naval aviation history. By 1976 he had attained the  rank of captain, and was in uniform aboard the carrier USS Constellation for the Bicentennial celebration on July 4. In 1980, the Navy proposed a  period of active duty at the Pentagon that would have resulted in a  promotion to rear admiral, bringing him even with Air Force Reserve  Brigadier General James Stewart.  Fresh on the heels of a second directing Emmy, he felt his absence  would impact achieving a long-held goal of directing motion pictures,  and reluctantly declined. (The opportunity in films never materialized.)  Holds Letters of Commendation from six secretaries of the Navy. Was  honorary chairman of the U.S. Navy Memorial Foundation and a charter  member of VIVA, the effort to return POW-MIAs from Vietnam. Upon  retirement in 1982, he was decorated with the Legion of Merit by Navy  Secretary John F. Lehman Jr.. Other than Stewart, no performer in his industry has achieved a higher uniformed rank in the U.S. military. (Glenn Ford was also a Naval Reserve captain, and director and Captain John Ford was awarded honorary flag rank upon his 1951 retirement from the Naval Reserve).
data.name: Jackie Cooper

Patrick Dewaere (26 January 1947 – 16 July 1982) was a French film actor. Born in Saint-Brieuc, Côtes-d'Armor, he was the son of French actress Mado Maurin. An actor from a young age, his career lasted more than 21 years until his suicide in Paris, in 1982.

Patrick Dewaere was the third child of an actor's family. His biological father, Michel Têtard, was a lyricist who had an affair with Dewaere's mother, Mado Maurin, who was married to Pierre-Marie Bourdeaux. Dewaere grew up believing Bourdeaux was his biological father. After Dewaere's parents divorced, his mother remarried Georges Collignon, who sexually abused Dewaere as a child. Under the direction of his mother, Dewaere, his four brothers and his sister performed in movies and television series. The family lived in Paris. Dewaere attended the Cours Hattemer, a private school.

One of his first TV appearances was in 1961, when he was 14 years old. He appeared in a video for the song "Nuits d'Espagne" by Dalida. Later, he was a promising and popular French actor in the late 1960s and 1970s.

At the age of 17, Dewaere learned that he was not the biological child of his mother’s ex-husband, Pierre-Marie Bourdeaux, but that of conductor and singer Michel Têtard. In 1968, he took the name of "Dewaere" which his maternal great-grandmother inspired him. A year earlier, he had met his first wife, Sotha, an actress who co-founded the Café de la Gare, an experimental theatre. They separated in 1970 but remained married for eleven years.

From 1968, he collaborated with the Café de la Gare, where he met Miou-Miou and Gérard Depardieu, with whom he made a breakthrough after many secondary roles in various films, in the scandalous comedy Going Places. Miou-Miou became Dewaere’s companion and the mother of his daughter Angèle (1974). She left Dewaere for singer Julien Clerc, shortly before the shooting of F...like Fairbanks, in which both play a couple in separation.

Patrick Dewaere became one of the most popular actors in French cinema in the 1970s. Between 1977 and 1982, he was nominated five times to the Césars in the "Best Actor" category, the most important award in France. In his work, Dewaere was restless and very conscientious, which may have caused his depressed mood. He also had serious drug problems, and it is known that he had been sexually abused as a child. He consolidated his status as a savage and ruthless actor in Alain Corneau’s cult film Série noire (1979). In his roles, Dewaere was long attached to the kind of young rebel. Only in his later films did his comic and dramatic diversity manifest itself. He often worked with director Bertrand Blier.

In 1980, Dewaere hit a journalist who had announced against his will his union with Elsa Chalier. Subsequently, the actor was ignored by the French press, his name was even abbreviated with his initials (P.D).

For eleven years Dewaere was married to French actress Sotha. In the early 1970s, he became the companion of French actress Miou-Miou, until they separated in 1976. They had one daughter. Shortly before the release of Paradis Pour Tous (1982), a black comedy where his character tries to commit suicide, the actor shot himself in his house in Paris. He was 35 years old. ...

data.name: Patrick Dewaere

data.biography:
Patrick Bourdeaux, dit Patrick Dewaere, est un acteur français né le 26 janvier 1947 à Saint-Brieuc (Côtes-du-Nord) et mort le 16 juillet 1982 dans le 14e arrondissement de Paris.

Après avoir été enfant acteur parmi les «petits Maurin», menés par leur mère Mado, il s'émancipe au sein de la troupe du café de la Gare puis il est révélé au grand public en même temps que Gérard Depardieu dans le film Les Valseuses en 1974, devenant une valeur montante du cinéma français et tournant pour différents réalisateurs comme Claude Miller, Yves Boisset, Jean-Jacques Annaud, André Téchiné, Alain Corneau, Henri Verneuil ou encore Bertrand Blier, son ami.

Il est considéré comme un des acteurs les plus brillants de sa génération, au jeu caractérisé par le naturel, l'exactitude et la vérité des expressions, des gestes et des attitudes. Inventif et généreux, ce style est rapproché de celui prôné par l’Actors Studio, quand bien même, à la fin des années 1970, les critiques lui préfèrent les «rondeurs» de Gérard Depardieu, son alter-ego professionnel, concurrent et ami. Il est ainsi l'un des grands oubliés des César, jamais récompensé malgré une nomination comme meilleur acteur dans un second rôle et cinq autres comme meilleur acteur.

Alternant drames, comédies, comédies dramatiques, thrillers et polars, il marque de ses interprétations F… comme Fairbanks (1976), Coup de tête (1979), Série noire (1979), Un mauvais fils (1980), Beau-père (1981), Hôtel des Amériques (1981) et Paradis pour tous (1982) ainsi que de grands succès populaires — obtenant, dans un premier temps, de meilleurs résultats au box-office que Depardieu — tels qu’Adieu poulet (1975) avec Lino Ventura, Le Juge Fayard dit «le Shériff» (1977), La Clé sur la porte (1978) avec Annie Girardot et Préparez vos mouchoirs (1978) où il retrouve Depardieu.

Il se suicide à l'âge de trente-cinq ans, après avoir joué dans trente-sept longs métrages et incarné durant trente et un ans une soixantaine de personnages différents au théâtre, au cinéma et à la télévision. Il a également composé la musique du film F… comme Fairbanks, plusieurs chansons pour Françoise Hardy et d'autres qu'il interprète lui-même.

Il est le père de la scénariste Angèle Herry, née de sa relation avec Miou-Miou et de la comédienne Lola Dewaere d'une seconde union.

Fils de la comédienne Mado Maurin, Patrick Bourdeaux fait partie d’une famille d'artistes, surnommée dans le métier les «petits Maurin». La troupe est composée de ses demi-frères Jean-Pierre Maurin (1941 – 1996), Yves-Marie Maurin (1944 – 2009) et Dominique Collignon-Maurin (1949), auxquels s’adjoignent ensuite ses autres demi-frère et sœur Jean-François Vlérick (1957) et Marie-Véronique Maurin (1960), laquelle utilise le pseudonyme «Marie Wiart» à partir de 1982. Cette troupe familiale collabore à de nombreux films, téléfilms, feuilletons télévisés ainsi qu'à des représentations au théâtre et à la radio. ...

Source: Article "Patrick Dewaere" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA.

Patrick Dewaere war ein französischer Schauspieler. Zu Beginn seiner Karriere nannte er sich Patrick Maurin nach dem Namen der Mutter Mado Maurin.

Im Jahr 1968 nahm er den Namen „Dewaere“ an, zu dem ihn seine Urgroßmutter mütterlicherseits anregte. Ein Jahr zuvor hatte er seine erste Ehefrau, Sotha, eine Schauspielerin und Mitbegründerin des Experimentaltheaters „Café de la Gare“, kennengelernt. Sie trennten sich 1970, blieben allerdings insgesamt elf Jahre verheiratet.

Ab 1968 arbeitete Dewaere mit dem „Café de la Gare“ zusammen, wo er Miou-Miou und Gérard Depardieu kennenlernte, mit denen er, nach zahlreichen Nebenrollen in verschiedenen Filmen, in der skandalumwitterten Filmkomödie Die Ausgebufften seinen Durchbruch hatte. Miou-Miou wurde seine Lebensgefährtin und Mutter der gemeinsamen Tochter Angèle. Miou-Miou verließ Dewaere für den Sänger Julien Clerc.

Dewaere wurde einer der beliebtesten Darsteller des französischen Kinos der 1970er Jahre. Zwischen 1977 und 1982 war er in der Kategorie Bester Hauptdarsteller fünfmal für Frankreichs wichtigsten Filmpreis César nominiert. In seiner Arbeit galt Dewaere als rastlos und äußerst gewissenhaft. Er litt unter depressiven Stimmungen und hatte Drogenprobleme. In seinen Rollen war Dewaere lange Zeit auf den Typ des rebellierenden Jugendlichen festgelegt. Erst in seinen späteren Filmen kam seine komödiantische wie dramatische Vielseitigkeit zum Ausdruck.

Im Jahr 1980 wurde Dewaere gegenüber einem Journalisten handgreiflich, nachdem dieser seine Verehelichung mit Elsa Chalier publik gemacht hatte. Chalier verließ Dewaere 1982 für seinen Freund Coluche. Kurz darauf, am 16. Juli 1982, erschoss sich Dewaere in seinem Haus in Paris mit einem Gewehr vom Kaliber 22, das ihm von Coluche geschenkt worden war.

In Erinnerung an Dewaere wurde der „Jean-Gabin-Preis“ 2008 in Patrick-Dewaere-Preis umbenannt.

石飞惠里花是日本的女性声优、模特儿，同时是声优团体“Purely Monster”的成员，埼玉县出身。隶属于Holy Peak

2012年12月在时尚雑志《Popteen》举办的“第4回Popteen模特儿甄选”中进入总决赛，并获得“POP模特儿赏”。后来以读者模特儿的身份出道。

2016年6月2日以声优身份加入Holy Peak。

2017年5月成为声优偶像团体“Purely Monster”的成员。

data.biography:
Elizabeth Alindogan Kho (born February 7, 1963, in Sorsogon), known professionally as Liz Alindogan, is an actress in the Philippines.

Alindogan was a model when discovered by comedian Dolphy in a fashion show in Manila Hotel. Her first film was Dolphy's Angels in 1980 with Carmi Martin, Anna Marie Gutierrez, Yehlen Catral and Dolphy.

She did also sexy movies in mid-'80s such as Heartache City with Maria Isabel Lopez, Escort Girls with Jacklyn Jose, Unang Karanasan with George Estregan, Company of Women with Mark Gil, Mga Nakaw Na Sandali with Ronaldo Valdez, and The Diary of Vietnam Rose.

She became the leading lady of action stars like Fernando Poe, Jr. in Ang Panday, Ang Aguila at Falcon, and Sierra Madre, Rudy Fernandez in Wanted: Sabas, Dante Varona in Nagbabagang Lupa... Nagbabagang Araw, Ace Vergel in Kapwa Simaron, and Jess Lapid, Jr. in Cuadro de Alas.

Alindogan was part of 100 Days to Heaven (2011) of ABS-CBN's television series, starring Coney Reyes, Jodi Sta. Maria and Xyriel Manabat, among others.
data.name: Liz Alindogan
